what_stands_out: The recurring metaphor of performance assessments being compared to a high-stakes competition
A distinct contrast between appreciation for financial rewards and frustration with the time commitment required to earn them
Widespread reports of burnout and difficulty maintaining personal boundaries
The dichotomy between valuing the company's prestige and feeling isolated by its rigid structure
